productDisplayName: Baggit Women Hero Brush Black Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit and drop it into your messy hold-all. This three-fold piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Dimensions: 19 cm x 9 cmCrafted from fabric with a three-fold open styleConcealed magnetic button closurePrinted branding on the backFive card holders, one id card holder, two pockets and a key holder on the left foldSix card holders on the centre foldA zippered pocket on the backCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
